ques: Search for the latest research papers on quantum computing submitted to ArXiv within the last two days.
answer: The latest quantum computing papers submitted to ArXiv within the last two days (as of 25 June 2026) include arXiv:2606.26088 "Simulating Universal Quantum Gate Sets on Photonic OAM Qubits..." (quant-ph) and arXiv:2606.26085 "Analytic Approach to Quantum Control Using Quantum Signal Processing" (quant-ph), both submitted 24 June 2026, found via ArXiv search for "quantum computing" sorted by submission date (newest first).
